name: Unsafe yaml.load
description: yaml.load without Loader=SafeLoader can execute arbitrary Python code from untrusted YAML.
rationale: PyYAML's default loader can construct arbitrary Python objects. Always use SafeLoader or safe_load for untrusted input.
compliant_code:
import yaml
data = yaml.safe_load(stream)
# or yaml.load(stream, Loader=yaml.SafeLoader)
